---
title: "Deleting Pages From A Document"
---

---
title: "Deleting Pages from a Document"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Capture/hsg1646248502406"
section: "Hyland Capture"
---

You can delete selected pages from a document.

To delete selected pages:

1.  On the relevant document area, do one of the following:
-
To select a single page, click the thumbnail image of the page you want to delete and select the check box in the upper-left corner.

-
To select multiple pages, click the thumbnail image and select the check box in the upper-left corner of each thumbnail image. A tick appears on the selected pages.

2.  In the upper-right corner of the document area, click the vertical ellipsis icon.   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
A drop-down menu is displayed.

3.  Click Delete selected pages or press Delete. The relevant pages are deleted from the document.
